title: McTiers PvP
description: a Qol modpack designed specifically for McTiers, improving performance and adding useful utilities.
body:
# CHECK OUT [MCTIERS](https://mctiers.com/rankings/overall)
#  ⭐Main Features
### 🚀Performance
This mod pack can improve chunk rendering and game logic by using performance mods, reducing hardware resulting in a major performance boost.

### ⚔️PvP utilities
This modpack only comes with a small yet reasonable amount of must-have pvp mods _( unlike many other modpacks where they throw everything in )_, but I can guarantee it is more than enough to help you climb up the tiers.

### ⚙️Compatibility
These mods are open-source allowing you to add mods without worrying about breaking the game.


<details>
<summary>Included Mods (28)</summary>
  
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [NoWheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/nowheel)
- [Player Health Indicators](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerhealthindicators)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)
- [TierTagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger)
- [TotemCounter](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter)
- [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)
</details>

# Bug reports and feature requests coming soon!
